query: SELECT msm.supplierId, s.supplierName, msm.sharePercentage FROM material_supplier_mappings msm JOIN suppliers s ON msm.supplierId = s.id WHERE msm.materialCode = 'A1300003' ORDER BY s.supplierName;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2oD5Rpux9cjqHPq.05f21cb26eb8 --database ZuNBVd6CLssbosJUyd9j6x --execute SELECT msm.supplierId, s.supplierName, msm.sharePercentage FROM material_supplier_mappings msm JOIN suppliers s ON msm.supplierId = s.id WHERE msm.materialCode = 'A1300003' ORDER BY s.supplierName;
